name: Two-Factor Authentication
description: Native two-factor authentication for Jellyfin with TOTP, email OTP, device pairing, and trusted device support.
overview: Server-side 2FA that works with all clients — web, mobile, TV, and service integrations.

versions.changelog: Initial release. TOTP (RFC 6238), email OTP fallback, trusted device tokens, TV device pairing, LAN bypass, API key bypass, brute force protection, push notifications (ntfy/Gotify), audit logging, admin dashboard.
